_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: We used RNA sequencing (RNA-seq), bisulfite sequencing (bisulfite-seq), and chromatin immunoprecipitation sequencing (ChIP-seq) to characterize and integrate transcriptome
details: Used for RNA-seq alignment to characterize transcriptome responses to DNMT1-targeted therapy in PRC2-isogenic MPNST cells
